title: test cnst_entr_pi_detr for all scm cases

body:
This PR: 
- delete obsolete cases (Now the only entrainment/detrainment option is const. entrainment and pi-groups detrainment. So there is no need to run the same simulation with different entr/detr option)
- unifies tha naming convention for different edmf ci cases.
title: delete obsolete cases, cleanup in names

body:
Right now we can't have zero reference state in regression tests because we normalize the error norm by the reference state. 

I'm deleting here the ARM updraft properties from regression tests because after the recent changes they are now zero.
title: remove ARM updrafts from regression

body:
This PR adds a bomex box experiment setup (without the sub-grid scale model). 

I think the initial condition and forcings are applied correctly. Not sure about the surface parameters...
title: Add Bomex box experiment
